description_long: This is a rectangular, vintage-style toolbox with a textured, weathered exterior, likely made from a combination of metal and reinforced cardboard or fiberboard. The corners are reinforced with darker metal brackets, providing extra durability and a classic industrial look. Two metal latches are present on the front side, securing the lid, while a sturdy, folding metal handle is attached to one of the shorter sides for carrying. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with visible signs of wear and age, suggesting frequent use. The box is relatively shallow and wide, suitable for storing hand tools or small equipment, and its construction implies it is both portable and robust for urban or workshop environments.
description: A vintage, rectangular toolbox with reinforced metal corners, dual latches, and a folding metal handle, featuring a weathered, matte surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the toolbox with two metal latches and reinforced corners clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the folding metal handle and the reinforced corners, with the latches less visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain surface with reinforced corners and no visible latches or handles.
description_view_3: This side view again shows the folding handle and reinforced corners, with a partial view of the latches on the right edge.
attribute_handle_type: Folding rectangular metal handle, fixed to the side, robust and utilitarian with no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two metal clasp latches on the front, simple mechanical type, no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, no visible trays, drawers, or dividers from the exterior.
